violations.description: Planner agent uses non-standard log structure (gate-completions/, gate-failures/) instead of standard Gates/ and Conversations/
violations.impact: Planner log structure deviates from standard architecture, may affect automated log processing and gate system integration
violations.remediation: Migrate Planner log structure to standard Logs/Planner/Gates/ and Logs/Planner/Conversations/ format

violations.description: Executor workflow (Execute.md) is a stub and does not follow complete template structure
violations.impact: Incomplete workflow may not provide proper gate enforcement and quality metrics
violations.remediation: Implement complete Executor workflow following Workflow_Template.md structure with all required sections

violations.description: Researcher workflow (Research.md) is a stub and does not follow complete template structure
violations.impact: Incomplete workflow may not provide proper gate enforcement and quality metrics
violations.remediation: Implement complete Researcher workflow following Workflow_Template.md structure with all required sections

violations.impact: Incomplete workflow may not provide proper gate enforcement and quality metrics
violations.remediation: Implement complete Reviewer workflow following Workflow_Template.md structure with all required sections

violations.description: Some workflow files use descriptive names instead of {Agent}_Workflow.md format (Execute.md, Research.md, Review.md)
violations.impact: Minor naming convention deviation, does not affect functionality
violations.remediation: Consider renaming to Executor_Workflow.md, Researcher_Workflow.md, Reviewer_Workflow.md for consistency

actions_taken: Migrated 24 log files from gate-completions/ to Gates/
Migrated 21 log files from gate-failures/ to Gates/
Removed obsolete gate-completions/ and gate-failures/ directories
remediation_summary.outcome: Logs directory structure compliance now PASSED
